text.title: cqrs-pattern Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cqrs-pattern as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Command handler returns a DTO or full entity after saving, forcing the handler to also build a read projection inline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Couples write and read optimization. Breaks the single-responsibility of commands. Prevents independent scaling of read and write sides.

failure-mode.description: Query handler modifies state (increments view count, updates last-seen timestamp) as part of returning data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Callers assume reads are idempotent and safe to retry. Hidden writes violate this assumption, cause double-counting, and break eventual consistency reasoning.
